summary.description:
Today, a bit warmer for the outside temperature (up 3.3°C) and feels like temperature (up 2.0°C).

The past week and month had observable variation in the amount of wind (up 21 miles) and cloud levels (down 129 m) when compared to today.

The cloud levels yesterday fell between 436m minimum and 1505m maximum, with an average of 1010.4m; weekly and monthly averages were marginally higher at 881.0m and 863.7m.

summary.summary: Inside; a mild and comfortable temperature is anticipated. Outside; hot temperatures will prevail. Also, very sticky and muggy conditions are expected and some wind, breezy at times. Drizzle or light rain possible, cloud cover will be variable, overcast at times, and bright sunshine will dominate the day. Similar weather conditions should remain.
